name: Chicken in Lime
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim all visible fat from chicken breasts.
2. Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat until hot. Away from the heat, coat with cooking spray. Add breasts, onion, and garlic. Sauté until breasts are browned, about 8 minutes, turning once.
3. Add seasonings and soy sauce. Reduce heat; cover; cook until chicken is fork tender and no longer pink, about 15-20 minutes.
4. Cut one lime into quarters; halve the other.
5. Place chicken on serving dish; top with the sauce from the pan; sprinkle with juice from the halved lime (about 2 tbsp). Serve with the lime quarters.
